pi_items.source: Subsurface source code and configuration files (qPrefLog, profilewidget.ui)

privileged_info_summary: The Subsurface application contains options to enable a 'Tissue heat-map' (often toggled via the profile graph context menu) and 'Average depth' or 'mean depth' (accessible via the preferences panel). Enabling these settings modifies the dive profile graph by adding a colorful background gradient and a horizontal average depth line, respectively.
